# Catalog — diagrams

*Product catalog: plan definitions consumed by Subscriptions.*

## Domain

```mermaid
classDiagram
  namespace Catalog {
    class Plan {
      +planId : Id «key»
      +licenseFee : Money
      +usageRate : Money

      monthly
```
